creator: aaron@FreeBSD.org
text:
When trying to build I get the following error:

aaron@moondance//usr/ports/print/musixtex: make depends
===>   musixtex-T112 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg_info - found
===>   musixtex-T112 depends on executable in : tex - found
===>   musixtex-T112 depends on executable in : tex - found
aaron@moondance//usr/ports/print/musixtex: make
=> musixtex-T112.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch from 
ftp://ftp.tex.ac.uk/tex-archive/macros/musixtex/taupin/.
fetch: 
ftp://ftp.tex.ac.uk/tex-archive/macros/musixtex/taupin/musixtex-T112.tar.gz: 
File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Attempting to fetch from 
ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/.
musixtex-T112.tar.gz                          100% of 1000 kB  125 kBps
=> musixexa-T112.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch from 
ftp://ftp.tex.ac.uk/tex-archive/macros/musixtex/taupin/.
musixexa-T112.tar.gz                          100% of  158 kB   92 kBps
===>  Extracting for musixtex-T112
=> MD5 Checksum OK for musixtex-T112.tar.gz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for musixtex-T112.tar.gz.
=> MD5 Checksum OK for musixexa-T112.tar.gz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for musixexa-T112.tar.gz.
===>   musixtex-T112 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg_info - found
===>  Patching for musixtex-T112
===>   musixtex-T112 depends on executable in : tex - found
===>  Configuring for musixtex-T112
===>  Building for musixtex-T112
(cd system/c-source; cc -O2 -o ../../musixflx musixflx.c)
(cd tex; export 
TEXFONTS=/usr/ports/print/musixtex/work/musixtex-T112/tfm:;  initex '&tex 
../system/dos/musixtex.ins \dump')
initex: not found
*** Error code 127

Stop in /usr/ports/print/musixtex/work/musixtex-T112.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/print/musixtex.
aaron@moondance//usr/ports/print/musixtex: locate initex
aaron@moondance//usr/ports/print/musixtex:
